overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through Night City at dusk. The journey proceeds from a wide street with digital billboards, past a pagoda-style structure, up a large outdoor staircase, and into an upper commercial plaza filled with neon signs and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet city sidewalk toward a distinctive pagoda-style structure

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street from left to right
pedestrian with backpack walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the left side of the street
tall traditional-asian-inspired tower with multiple digital screens and red signage
cluster of towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents in the background
tall ornate street lamps lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street at dusk, with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights. The player walks forward past a large digital billboard on the left, heading toward a distinctive pagoda-style tower in the distance. Sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles share the space.

events.description: turns right toward the large outdoor staircase structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through the plaza and turning right to approach the base of a large staircase

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians congregating near the stairway entrance

entered.detail: wide outdoor staircase with red-brown steps leading upward between buildings
multi-story building facade illuminated with pink and blue neon lighting
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the pagoda tower into a more open plaza area with trees in planters. The camera turns right toward a prominent outdoor staircase flanked by a building with vibrant pink neon lighting. The environment transitions from the main street to the stairway approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep outdoor staircase between cyberpunk structures

events.description: begins ascending the steep outdoor staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs surrounded by other pedestrians, with tall buildings rising on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair walking down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge spanning between buildings above the staircase
tall cylindrical building with horizontal black and white stripes and large digital displays
glowing pink and blue neon signs mounted on the walls flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a steep, wide staircase that cuts between towering cyberpunk buildings. The space becomes narrow and enclosed, with neon signs illuminating the walls and an overhead walkway visible above. Other pedestrians move up and down the stairs, creating an opposing flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza observing the neon-lit shop fronts and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: heavily augmented pedestrian with visible cybernetic implants walking past

entered.detail: tall vertical banner displaying a holographic face with yellow background
row of storefronts with bright cyan and pink neon lighting and digital displays
rounded building corner with illuminated signage and vending machines

segments.scene_description: Emerging at the top of the stairs, the player enters a vibrant upper-level commercial plaza. The area is filled with neon-lit shop kiosks, holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians. A large vertical holographic banner dominates the center of view as the player walks deeper into this elevated cyberpunk marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, rain-slicked city street at dusk into a vibrant, elevated commercial marketplace. It begins by moving past a large digital billboard on wet pavement, heading toward a distant pagoda-style tower amidst sparse traffic. As the camera passes the tower and enters an open plaza with planters, it turns right toward a steep outdoor staircase flanked by vibrant pink neon lighting. The scene then shifts into a narrow, enclosed ascent between towering buildings and overhead walkways, where the flow of pedestrians creates a sense of urban density. Finally, the camera emerges at the top of the stairs into a bustling upper-level plaza filled with neon shop kiosks and a dominating vertical holographic banner.
